_comment: Manifold: Cubic = Expression(z=xy) + Attributes + Substrate(Gyroid). Lens: Schwartz Diamond on well walls.
name: Cubic
description: 3D Tetris — drop and rotate polycube pieces into an elongated 4×4×20 tower well. Every piece is a point in a higher dimension; every layer a whole in a lower.

dimension._note: z = x*y = 4*4 = 16 (cells per layer). Axiom satisfied.

dsl: geometry  = BoxGeometry(x, ROWS, y) with wire grid
substrate = 'gyroid: sin(x)cos(y) + sin(y)cos(z) + sin(z)cos(x) = 0 (visual well skin)'

substrates.visual: inline Three.js MeshPhysicalMaterial — clearcoat glass blocks, ACES filmic
substrates.audio: inline Web Audio API — zero asset files, all tones synthesised from manifold coords
substrates.physics: inline gravity ticker — lock delay 0.5s, 7-bag randomiser, kick table
